prompt: We had a production outage on our checkout service today starting around 14:32. The service was returning 500 errors on POST /api/checkout. I checked the logs and saw 'Error: could not connect to database'. We investigated and found that DATABASE_URL was missing from the production environment — the deploy script's vault_secrets function had been removed in a refactor last week. We added it back and redeployed at 15:04. Checkout came back up immediately. /pir
assertions: Output file is a .md file in the outputs directory
Document contains a ## Root Cause section
Document contains an ## Action Items section with at least one checklist item
Document contains a ## Lessons Learned section
Severity field uses the defined scale (Critical, High, Medium, or Low) — not P0/P1 or other formats
Root cause explains the mechanism (not just names the missing var — should mention vault_secrets removal and why .env masked it)
